category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Myanmar) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Myanmar Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入缅甸：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入緬甸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Myanmar requirements: MSTRD standards and conformity documentation where in scope, MS/IEC 62133 safety basis, MPT approval for wireless-embedded products, MIC/import interface, Yangon/Thilawa or Mandalay customs routes, 230 V 50 Hz grid context, and UN 38.3 transport.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与缅甸要求对照：适用范围内的MSTRD标准及合格文件、MS/IEC 62133安全基础、带无线功能产品的MPT审批、MIC/进口接口、仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒海关路径、230 V 50 Hz电网背景，以及UN 38.3运输要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與緬甸要求對照：適用範圍內的MSTRD標準及合格文件、MS/IEC 62133安全基礎、帶無線功能產品的MPT審批、MIC/進口接口、仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒海關路徑、230 V 50 Hz電網背景，以及UN 38.3運輸要求。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors, Myanmar import partners, MSTRD, MIC, MPT, MEPE, customs, and carriers before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问、缅甸进口伙伴、MSTRD、MIC、MPT、MEPE、海关及承运人核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問、緬甸進口夥伴、MSTRD、MIC、MPT、MEPE、海關及承運人核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese GB 31241 or CCC evidence is only a starting point for Myanmar. Exporters should confirm whether the exact lithium battery, power bank, charger, or wireless-enabled product is inside MSTRD conformity scope, prepare MS/IEC 62133 safety evidence, use MPT approval for embedded wireless functions where applicable, and retain UN 38.3 transport documentation for Yangon/Thilawa seaport or Mandalay overland routes from Yunnan. Myanmar does not have a horizontal RoHS regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国GB 31241或CCC证据只能作为进入缅甸的起点。出口商应确认具体锂电池、移动电源、充电器或带无线功能产品是否落入MSTRD合格评定范围，准备MS/IEC 62133安全证据，适用时为内置无线功能办理MPT审批，并为仰光/迪拉瓦海运或云南至曼德勒陆运路径保留UN 38.3运输文件。缅甸没有横向RoHS制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國GB 31241或CCC證據只能作為進入緬甸的起點。出口商應確認具體鋰電池、行動電源、充電器或帶無線功能產品是否落入MSTRD合格評定範圍，準備MS/IEC 62133安全證據，適用時為內置無線功能辦理MPT審批，並為仰光/迪拉瓦海運或雲南至曼德勒陸運路徑保留UN 38.3運輸文件。緬甸沒有橫向RoHS制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must preserve official-source URLs, publisher, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
